actionable_feedback: Include an alternate, parseable representation of the workbook calculations (CSV exports or a plain-text/JSON calculation appendix) so environments lacking openpyxl can inspect computed values and formulas.
In the repair memo, add explicit cell references (sheet and cell addresses) for key formulas, thresholds, and cost cells so reviewers can directly link memo claims to workbook cells.

Provide a short, cell-referenced worked example cost comparison (even conservative estimates or ranges) that sums interventions and compares to decision_budget_usd; place the numeric sums in the spreadsheet and mirror them in the memo.

Either remove or clearly justify the semantic_correctness_score when deterministic precheck marks semantic evaluation as not performed; update metadata to reflect the evidence basis (memo + execution trace) used for any semantic assertions.

Add a lightweight CSV or JSON representation of the 'Calculations' sheet (provisional_risk, sensitivity_risk, classification, support_status per record) as an artifact to ensure automatic preview/parsing in verification environments.
feedback_summary: The baseline attempt meets the rubric and was awarded full credit for producing the required artifacts, documenting the metric mapping, risk formula, classification rules, sensitivity application, and defensible disposition (needs_review) given the missing denominator. The verifier flagged two minor issues: (1) the .xlsx could not be parsed in the environment (openpyxl_unavailable), so workbook-specific claims rely on the memo and execution trace rather than direct cell inspection; (2) a procedural inconsistency where the deterministic precheck is marked 'semantic_correctness_not_evaluated' but the grader report includes a positive semantic_correctness_score. Addressing these will improve reproducibility and verifier confidence.

extra_model_fields.justification: These additions resolve inspectability constraints and remove ambiguity supporting the grader's claims without needing direct .xlsx parsing.
recommended_artifact_additions: Calculations_export.csv (or .tsv) with columns: record_id, dent_depth_mm, delam_area_cm2, ultrasound_confidence, residual_margin_pct_proxy, provisional_risk, classification, sensitivity_risk_5pct, sensitivity_class_5pct, support_status
Worked_costs_sheet.csv with cell-referenced cost lines and a summary total
Updated repair_memo.md with explicit sheet/cell references for formulas and cost totals

raw_llm_output.suggested_revision: Produce a revised attempt (401-revised) that adds parseable calculation exports (CSV/JSON), explicit cell references in the memo, a worked cost example with cell-referenced totals, and a metadata note reconciling the semantic score with the deterministic precheck; re-run the verifier precheck to confirm the .xlsx is inspectable or include the alternate exports.
